event_description: User submits the Get Involved contact form on the home page.
Thank-you page loads after a successful form submission, confirming campaign contact.
User views an individual issue detail page, indicating specific policy interest.
User clicks the Español link in the English header to switch to Spanish.
User clicks the English link in the Spanish header to switch back to English.
User clicks Read More on an issue card to navigate to the issue detail page.
